valueProps.bodyEn: No deposit, no lump sum. Your card's credit limit isn't blocked.
valueProps.bodyMs: Tiada deposit, tiada bayaran sekaligus. Had kredit kad anda tidak disekat.

valueProps.bodyEn: Nationwide delivery and professional installation by LG technicians, bundled in.
valueProps.bodyMs: Penghantaran seluruh negara dan pemasangan profesional oleh juruteknik LG — disertakan.

valueProps.bodyEn: Warranty, filter replacements and scheduled maintenance run for the entire 60 or 84 months.
valueProps.bodyMs: Waranti, penggantian penapis dan penyelenggaraan berjadual untuk sepanjang tempoh 60 atau 84 bulan.

valueProps.bodyEn: 60 or 84-month subscriptions. Outright purchase available on selected products.
valueProps.bodyMs: Langganan 60 atau 84 bulan. Pembelian tunai tersedia untuk produk terpilih.

testimonials.quote: Baru pindah rumah baru, bajet dah ketat. LG Subscribe bagi kami pasang peti sejuk, mesin basuh dan TV sekaligus — bayar bulanan je, tak perlu keluar duit besar.
testimonials.name: Amirah & Hafiz

testimonials.quote: Aircond lama rosak masa tengah renovate. Dalam seminggu dah pasang DUAL Inverter baru — pelan 60 bulan, tak sentuh savings langsung.
testimonials.name: Danial

testimonials.quote: Kami nak air bersih untuk anak-anak tapi tak mahu beli terus. ATOM-V pelan 7 tahun lebih murah dari beli air botol tiap bulan.
testimonials.name: Syafiqah & Razlan

testimonials.quote: Moved into our first condo with zero appliance budget left. LG Subscribe covered the whole kitchen — fridge, dishwasher and microwave — for under RM400 a month.
testimonials.name: Jason & Mei Ling

testimonials.quote: Kucing kami ada masalah bulu. AeroCatTower bersihkan udara dan jadi tempat kucing tidur sekali — dua dalam satu. Best decision.
testimonials.name: Farah

testimonials.quote: We renovated our terrace and needed everything at once — aircond, water purifier, washer. One WhatsApp chat, semua settle dalam satu pelan.
testimonials.name: Vikram & Priya

testimonials.quote: Styler tu memang game changer. Baju kerja segar balik dalam 20 minit, tak payah iron. Jimat masa pagi sebelum ke office.
testimonials.name: Aisyah

testimonials.quote: Our old top-loader finally gave up. Upgraded to the WashTower — washer and dryer in one tower, saves so much space in our apartment laundry area.
testimonials.name: Marcus & Sarah

testimonials.quote: Dehumidifier ni senyap gila, boleh tidur dengan selesa. Bilik tak lembap dah, baju kering lagi cepat masa musim hujan.
testimonials.name: Zulkifli

scenarios.bodyEn: Fill every room with premium LG appliances without touching your renovation budget. Monthly plans keep cash free for the things you really want.
scenarios.bodyMs: Lengkapkan setiap bilik dengan peralatan LG premium tanpa menyentuh bajet pengubahsuaian anda. Pelan bulanan membebaskan tunai untuk barangan yang anda benar-benar inginkan.

scenarios.bodyEn: Kit out the kitchen, laundry and living room in one plan. Delivery and installation scheduled around your handover date — nothing extra to coordinate.
scenarios.bodyMs: Lengkapkan dapur, bilik dobi dan ruang tamu dalam satu pelan. Penghantaran dan pemasangan dijadualkan mengikut tarikh serahan anda — tiada keperluan untuk menguruskan kontraktor berasingan.

scenarios.bodyEn: Swap your aging washer, fridge or TV for the latest LG — delivered, installed and cared for. Life moves faster than depreciation.
scenarios.bodyMs: Tukar mesin basuh, peti sejuk atau TV lama anda kepada model LG terbaru — dihantar, dipasang dan dijaga. Hidup bergerak lebih pantas daripada susut nilai peralatan.

steps.title: Browse & choose
steps.body: Pick a product, a 60 or 84-month term, and the care tier that fits how hands-on you want to be.

steps.title: Submit application
steps.body: Send us your details on WhatsApp. Our consultants handle eligibility and walk you through the plan.

steps.title: Register & sign
steps.body: Register a credit or debit card for monthly auto-debit and sign digitally. No deposit, no upfront lump sum.

steps.title: LG approves
steps.body: A quick credit check, then LG confirms the order and schedules delivery around your availability.

steps.title: Delivery & install
steps.body: Free nationwide doorstep delivery. A technician handles installation, commissioning and a walkthrough.

steps.title: Care for the term
steps.body: Scheduled maintenance, replacement filters and warranty repairs — all included for the full 60 or 84 months.

faqs.a: A monthly subscription that lets you enjoy premium LG appliances without the upfront cost. Delivery, installation and scheduled maintenance are bundled into the plan.
Malaysian citizens and permanent residents aged 21 and above with a valid IC and proof of address. Our consultants run a quick check during enquiry.

faqs.q: What happens at the end of my term?
faqs.a: The appliance transfers to you at the end of the contract — LG Subscribe is a rent-to-own arrangement. You can also speak to us about upgrading to a newer LG model. No hidden conditions — we walk through everything before you sign up.
Yes. Scheduled servicing and priority support are included throughout your subscription, depending on the plan tier you choose.
Early termination is available based on your plan terms. We walk through the details before you sign up — no hidden conditions.
